description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, collar in-seam and brush, splash and glitter print across the frontFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Splash in the waters of life in style in this cotton t-shirt from lee. Stylish to the hilt, it looks great with jeans and skirts when teamed with sleek, heeled sandals.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
